use_cases: Call-to-action buttons on landing pages requiring visual emphasis
Primary action triggers in web applications with branded color schemes
Interactive elements on marketing sites that need to stand out
ai_summary: A vibrant call-to-action button featuring an animated gradient background that intensifies on hover. The component uses a dark zinc base with a blur effect behind the indigo-purple-pink gradient, creating a modern glow effect suitable for primary actions in SaaS and modern web applications.
